description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a warm, tan-brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be firmly attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are straight, moderately padded, and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy, modern silhouette. The sofa stands on four short, dark wooden legs positioned at each corner, providing a slight elevation above the ground. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with subtle seam lines visible along the edges, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, tan-brown leather two-seater sofa with straight armrests, attached cushions, and short wooden legs. The design is clean, boxy, and contemporary, with smooth upholstery and subtle seam detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's symmetrical, boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the sofa's moderate depth and elevation on short legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted back panel and the sofa's overall rectangular form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg design, emphasizing the sofa's consistent profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, moderately padded, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, exposed wooden legs at each corner, block-style with a dark finish, slightly tapered.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached, rectangular cushions, continuous and unsegmented.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid tan-brown color with a smooth, matte finish and subtle seam lines; no visible decorative pattern or tufting.
